approved_command_preview: Patch PR #271 current head c2b9aa5925f9eb363ff9b24cac955368d9b9404b after internal readback caught escaped newline line-count regressions from the discovery-root path-policy patch. The command verifies exact branch head and blob SHAs, updates only the two line_count expressions, runs focused PowerShell path-policy tests and collector tool discovery, commits to the PR branch, and pushes with the bridged GitHub token. The PR remains Draft and no external review request is posted.
